name: Baskets
notes: Selected by Baskets.Id (integer PK) via BasketWithItemsSpecification — also eagerly loads the BasketItems collection.
Not written — Basket itself is not mutated, only its child BasketItems collection.

name: BasketItems
notes: Selected as part of the Baskets eager load (BasketWithItemsSpecification.Include(b => b.Items)).
UPDATE for each item whose Id appears in the quantities map and quantity > 0; DELETE for items set to quantity=0 (via Basket.RemoveEmptyItems before UpdateAsync).
